greeting: Hi there! I'm the virtual receptionist at Lucky Dog Grooming. How can I help your furry friend today? 🐾

faq.a: Give us a call at (303) 568-9590! Please leave your pet's breed and weight when requesting a booking.
Yes! We groom pets big and small.

faq.q: What if my dog is matted?
faq.a: No worries — we're experienced with matted coats. We'll be transparent about what to expect based on your dog's coat condition.
We're open Monday through Friday, 7 AM to 1:30 PM. We're closed Saturday and Sunday.
We're in Virginia Village at 1950 S Holly St. #2, Denver, CO 80222.

escalation: Great question! Let me have Brandi get back to you on that.
